channel.title: Ecology on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Ecology on Nature Works

item.title: Biodiverse
item.description:
Just a couple of quick links, UK & global ecology references

For a long time, I’ve been singing the praises of the Database of Insects and their Food Plants. http://localhost:1313/blog/230209-biodiverse/

item.title: Species
item.description:
National Biodiversity Network Atlas is amazeballs

Conscious I haven’t been blogging every day, so will be posting whatever comes up. http://localhost:1313/blog/230205-species/

item.title: Life as the measure
item.description:
Gross Domestic Product is a pretty useless measure of a country’s prosperity, it’s time to factor in the true cost of economic activity by using life as the measure

Don’t know much about ecology, don’t know much economics either but what I do know is what a wonderful world it would be, if we used life as the measure, rather than human derived financial value (AKA money). http://localhost:1313/blog/life-as-the-measure/
